name: Coffee-Coconut Muffins
recipeInstructions:
1. Grease and flour 12 muffin cups, or use paper liners.
2. Cream the margarine, sugar, and brown sugar in a large electric mixer bowl until very light and fluffy. Beat in the eggs one at a time.
3. Sift together the flour, baking powder, and salt.
4. Combine the coffee, milk, vanilla extract, and almond extract (if using) in a separate bowl.
5. Alternately add the coffee mixture and the sifted dry ingredients into the margarine mixture. Stir in the chopped nuts and dried coconut until just combined.
6. Divide the batter evenly among the 12 muffin cups.
7. Bake in a preheated oven at 375°F (190°C) for 25-35 minutes or until a toothpick inserted into the center comes out clean.
8. Allow to cool on a wire rack for 5 minutes before removing from the muffin tin and cooling further before enjoying with coffee or tea.
